title: DSA Patterns Mastery
description: Stop memorising solutions. Start recognising patterns. This phase turns 500 problems into 1000+ solvable ones.

phase_consolidation.title: Phase 3 Consolidation
phase_consolidation.mental_map: Two Pointers -> Sliding Window -> Fast/Slow -> Merge Intervals -> Binary Search on Answer -> BFS -> DFS/Backtracking -> DP -> Greedy -> Monotonic Stack
mixed_problems: Two Sum (sorted array) using two pointers.
Longest substring without repeating characters (sliding window).
weak_spot_tasks: 20-min Two Pointer recap: pair sum + container.
20-min Sliding Window recap: max sum subarray.
20-min Binary Search on Answer recap: Koko.

linkedin_card.headline: I just completed DSA Patterns on DSA OS - I can now solve 1000 LeetCode problems with eyes closed 🧠 Day X streak!
